tool.name: Build hub BigBed inputs
tool.description: selection BED12+5 and orthogroup membership BED12 for a UCSC hub
tool.command: ## Galaxy stores datasets as .dat; symlink BUSTED archives to a .tar.gz name ## so the python tarfile reader opens them as gzip-compressed tar. ln -s '$busted_strict' busted_strict.tar.gz && #if $relaxed.do_relaxed == 'yes' ln -s '$relaxed.busted_relaxed' busted_relaxed.tar.gz && #end if python '$__tool_directory__/build_hub_bb.py' --ortholog-table '$ortholog_table' --ref-bed12 '$ref_bed12' --sizes '$sizes' --ref-acc '$ref_acc' --ref-column '$ref_column' --gene-prefix '$gene_prefix' --busted-strict busted_strict.tar.gz --out-selection-strict selection_strict.bed #if $relaxed.do_relaxed == 'yes' --busted-relaxed busted_relaxed.tar.gz --out-selection-relaxed selection_relaxed.bed #end if --out-orthogroup orthogroup_membership.bed && bedToBigBed -type=bed12+5 -as='$__tool_directory__/bigSelectionPlus5.as' -tab selection_strict.bed '$sizes' selection_strict.bb && #if $relaxed.do_relaxed == 'yes' bedToBigBed -type=bed12+5 -as='$__tool_directory__/bigSelectionPlus5.as' -tab selection_relaxed.bed '$sizes' selection_relaxed.bb && #end if bedToBigBed -type=bed12 orthogroup_membership.bed '$sizes' orthogroup_membership.bb

param.label: Ortholog table (TSV)
param.help: Tab-separated table with columns orthogroup_id, label, n_strains and one column per strain. The reference column lists reference gene IDs (pipe-separated for multi-copy).

param.label: Reference gene models (BED12)
param.help: BED12 of reference gene models. Column 4 (name) must match the gene IDs in the ortholog table; a trailing .N isoform suffix is stripped and the first isoform kept.

param.label: Chromosome sizes
param.help: A .fa.fai index or 2-column (chrom, length) sizes file. Only the first two columns are read.

param.label: Reference accession label
param.help: Informational label for the reference assembly (e.g. GCA_900093555.2).

validator.message: Letters, digits, underscore, hyphen, dot only

param.label: Reference column name
param.help: Name of the ortholog-table column that holds reference gene IDs.

validator.message: Letters, digits, underscore, hyphen, dot only

param.label: Reference gene-ID prefix
param.help: Only gene IDs starting with this prefix are taken from the reference column.

validator.message: Letters, digits, underscore, hyphen, dot only

param.label: Strict BUSTED archive
param.help: gzip-compressed tar of HyPhy BUSTED results, laid out as <GENE_ID>/busted.json. p-values are read from the 'test results' block and FDR-corrected across mapped genes.

param.name: do_relaxed
param.label: Also build a relaxed selection track?
param.option: Yes - add a relaxed BUSTED selection track

param.label: Relaxed BUSTED archive
param.help: Second BUSTED archive (same <GENE_ID>/busted.json layout), e.g. a relaxed model run.

tool.help:
**Build hub BigBed inputs**
Consolidates the two original *P. vivax* hub scripts (`build_selection_bb.py` + `build_orthogroup_bb.py`) into one parameterized tool. It reads an **ortholog table**, a **reference BED12**, and one (or two) **HyPhy BUSTED archives**, then emits the BED files and BigBed tracks a UCSC assembly hub needs.
-----
**What it produces**
- *selection (strict)* - a **BED12+5** file (and `.bb`) with one row per reference gene that has a BUSTED result and maps to an orthogroup. The five extra columns are `orthogroup_id`, `n_strains`, `busted_pvalue`, `busted_qvalue_fdr`, and `gene_family`. q-values are Benjamini-Hochberg FDR across all mapped genes; color and score encode significance. - *selection (relaxed)* - the same, optionally, from a second BUSTED archive (e.g. a relaxed model run). - *orthogroup membership* - a plain **BED12** (and `.bb`) with one row per reference gene that maps to an orthogroup, colored by `n_strains` (few = red ... many = green). Genes whose blocks fall off the end of their chromosome are dropped.
-----
**Inputs**
- *Ortholog table* - TSV with `orthogroup_id`, `label`, `n_strains` and a per-strain column. The **reference column** (default `PvP01`) lists reference gene IDs, pipe-separated for multi-copy entries; only IDs starting with the **gene prefix** (default `PVP01_`) are kept. - *Reference BED12* - reference gene models; column 4 names match the table (the trailing `.N` isoform suffix is stripped, first isoform kept). - *Chromosome sizes* - a `.fa.fai` or 2-column sizes file. - *BUSTED archive(s)* - gzip-compressed tar laid out as `<GENE_ID>/busted.json`; the p-value is read from the `test results` block.
-----
Ported (with full CLI added) from the hardcoded `Pv4-pangenome/v3/ucsc_hub/build_selection_bb.py` and `build_orthogroup_bb.py`. BigBed conversion uses [`bedToBigBed`](https://genome.ucsc.edu/goldenPath/help/bigBed.html) from the UCSC Genome Browser utilities.
